commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5cf430b20602eeb0a4695ec408879c4c2d78c8ed)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds preflight force metadata to auto-reply compaction calls, forwards forced preflight compaction into context-engine compaction, and adds focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +23, Tests +48. Total +71 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source and discussion level: the author’s latest live Feishu oversized-turn validation still returns `Preflight compaction required but failed: below threshold`. Source inspection also shows PR head does not consume `params.force` in the direct runtime compactor.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs human follow-up because the branch still fails live oversized Feishu validation and the plugin-SDK force-field direction requires an explicit decision before merge.

target.title: fix: force preflight compaction before oversized agent turns
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes the preflight compaction path for oversized embedded agent turns.

When the auto-reply runner detects that the upcoming prompt is already over the safe token budget / transcript byte budget, it now marks the compaction request as preflight-required and forced. The context-engine compaction wrapper honors that force signal, instead of only forcing manual `/compact` calls.

This makes the upper-layer preflight budget gate authoritative: if a turn would otherwise fail with context overflow, OpenClaw should compact before submitting the prompt rather than returning no response.

Fixes #87234.

## Changes

- Add preflight force metadata to compact session params.
- Pass `force: true`, `forcePreflight: true`, `preflightRequired: true`, and the trigger (`tokens` / `transcript_bytes`) from the auto-reply preflight gate.
- Forward forced preflight compaction into context-engine compaction as `force: true` while keeping diagnostic reason/trigger metadata internal via `runtimeContext`.
- Keep existing manual compaction behavior as an internal `forceReason: "manual"` runtime context hint.
- Add regression coverage for both auto-reply preflight compaction and context-engine forced compaction.

## Real behavior proof

Current status: **failed live production validation; do not treat this PR as proven yet.**

- **Behavior or issue addressed:** Feishu/OpenClaw oversized turns can fail before model execution with `Preflight compaction required but failed: below threshold`, leaving Feishu DM/group sessions apparently unresponsive. This PR is intended to make the upper-layer preflight budget gate force compaction instead of letting the lower compaction threshold veto it.
- **Real environment tested:** Production OpenClaw VPS runtime used by Arthur's Feishu sessions (`/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/dist`, gateway on `127.0.0.1:18789`).
- **Exact live validation step:** Sent/observed a real message in the affected Merlin evolution Feishu group session:
  - chat: `oc_5cc1621461880ae8dccec0147e40896b` (`Merlin 进化论`)
  - session: `agent:main:feishu:group:oc_5cc1621461880ae8dccec0147e40896b`
  - message: `om_x100b6e49341518b4c398dd246766af6`
- **Actual observed result:** The live production turn reproduced the old failure:

```text
2026-05-28T13:50:38.154+08:00 feishu[default]: dispatching to agent (session=agent:main:feishu:group:oc_5cc1621461880ae8dccec0147e40896b)
2026-05-28T13:50:38.157+08:00 feishu[default][msg:om_x100b6e49341518b4c398dd246766af6]: dispatching to agent (session=agent:main:feishu:group:oc_5cc1621461880ae8dccec0147e40896b)
2026-05-28T13:50:41.213+08:00 message dispatch completed: channel=feishu sessionId=unknown sessionKey=agent:main:feishu:group:oc_5cc1621461880ae8dccec0147e40896b source=replyResolver outcome=error duration=2941ms error="Error: Preflight compaction required but failed: below threshold"
2026-05-28T13:50:41.217+08:00 message processed: channel=feishu chatId=chat:oc_5cc1621461880ae8dccec0147e40896b messageId=om_x100b6e49341518b4c398dd246766af6 sessionId=unknown sessionKey=agent:main:feishu:group:oc_5cc1621461880ae8dccec0147e40896b outcome=error duration=3057ms error="Error: Preflight compaction required but failed: below threshold"
2026-05-28T13:50:41.220+08:00 feishu[default]: failed to dispatch message: Error: Preflight compaction required but failed: below threshold
2026-05-28T13:50:41.222+08:00 feishu[default][msg:om_x100b6e49341518b4c398dd246766af6]: dispatch failed: Error: Preflight compaction required but failed: below threshold (elapsed=3126ms)
```

- **Interpretation:** Earlier successful probe turns were too small / not representative. They showed the session could answer simple turns, but not that the preflight-vs-threshold veto path was fixed. The latest real project turn in the Merlin evolution group is a better live test and shows the bug still reproduces in production.
- **Current conclusion:** This PR still has useful source-level regression coverage, but it does **not** yet have successful real behavior proof. The fix likely needs one more source/runtime adjustment before this issue can be closed.

## Verification

Ran targeted tests locally:

```text
./node_modules/.bin/vitest run src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-memory.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.test.ts --maxWorkers=1

Test Files  3 passed (3)
Tests       144 passed (144)
```

Note: `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile` was slow/flaky in this environment because `@matrix-org/matrix-sdk-crypto-nodejs` postinstall downloads timed out repeatedly. Existing `node_modules/.bin/vitest` was available, so the targeted regression suite was run directly.
